summary: Comprehensive E2E testing for P2 features: POST /api/document (new document), DELETE /api/document/block/{block_id}, toolbar formatting actions (bold/italic/underline, font family, font size), main menu actions (File: new/save/print, Edit: undo/redo/copy/paste, View: panels), panel close controls, and header layout. All backend tests passed (13/13). Frontend tests passed for core flows.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/document correctly resets the shared-canvas document to a blank state with single paragraph block and fresh version history
DELETE /api/document/block/{block_id} properly handles edge case of deleting the last block by auto-creating a replacement blank block
Block styles (bold/italic/underline), font_family, and font_size fields are properly sanitized and persisted via sanitize_block()
Panel close buttons (X) properly exist in PresenceMinimap and VersionTimeline components with correct data-testid attributes
Header layout has no overlap with workspace content (header ends at 199px, workspace starts at 199px)
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral TEST_ prefixed data; document state is reset between test runs via POST /api/document
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated against https://realtime-editor.stage-preview.emergentagent.com. Backend tests added for: TestNewDocumentEndpoint (create_default_title, create_custom_title), TestDeleteBlockEndpoint (delete_success, delete_not_found, removes_associated_comments), TestBlockFormattingPersistence (styles_persist, font_fields_present). Frontend Playwright tests confirmed: title rename, toolbar formatting buttons (B/I/U), font dropdowns, undo/redo, add/delete block, File/Edit/View menu actions, panel open/close with X buttons, page navigation, no header overlap. Inline AI suggestions remain MOCKED (frontend-local).
rca_of_the_issue: No blocking issues found. All requested P2 features (new document, delete block, toolbar formatting, menu actions, panel close controls, header layout) are working correctly.
